response.justification: Bogdan's extensive full-stack experience, particularly in TypeScript and Node.js, aligns strongly with the role's requirements. His background in renewable energy-adjacent projects (e.g., energy consulting platforms) and construction technology (e.g., renovation workflows) is directly relevant. While his experience skews senior, his pragmatic approach and team collaboration skills suggest adaptability to a mid-level role.
strengths: Proven full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, and React/Nest.js-like frameworks (Ember.js)
Direct experience in energy/construction-adjacent platforms (GISCollective, Green Map)
Strong cloud/AWS background (ECS, CDK) and Kubernetes deployment experience
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role (20+ years of experience)
Limited recent focus on PostgreSQL (currently using MongoDB)
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with his remote-friendly projects (e.g., GISCollective)
